original_abstract:
This study explores the multidimensional moral values depicted in Simpleman’s novel, *KKN di Desa Penari*, specifically examining the relationships between humans and the Divine, the self, and society. Employing a qualitative approach with a descriptive method, the research analyzes character dialogue and behavioral cues as primary data points. The researcher served as the primary instrument for data collection and interpretation. 

The findings reveal a rich tapestry of ethical themes: 23 instances of moral values pertaining to man’s relationship with God, 36 instances regarding the individual’s relationship with themselves, and 47 instances highlighting interpersonal dynamics between humans. These results suggest significant pedagogical implications for Indonesian language education. Specifically, the study can be integrated into Lesson Plans (RPP) and instructional materials aligned with Competency Standard (KD) 3.9. By utilizing this novel as a primary text, educators can help students more effectively identify and analyze the intrinsic, extrinsic, and linguistic elements of contemporary literature.
humanized_abstract:
Based on literature review conducted by the researcher, this study aims to explain the Moral Values depicted by the novelists through the medium of Simpleman in his novel entitled KKN di Desa Penari, especially those relating to the human relationship with God, human self and the human community. This study used qualitative approach with descriptive method. The data are in the form of speech and behaviour of the characters that are interpreted and described by the researcher as the main actor in this study.

There are many ethical themes and values shown in the novel, namely: a) values of human relationship to Allah, which appear in 23 places; b) values of human relationship to self which appear in 36 places; and c) values of human relationship to others which appear in 47 places. All these findings give lesson for teacher in teaching learning process of Indonesian language. There are implication to solve. The implication given in this paper is the suggestion to insert the novel as the main subject matter to Lesson Plan (RPP) based on Competency Standard (KD) 3.9. Based on the analysis given, the application of novel of this time as a media material in Indonesian language learning at SMAN 3 Palembang is a new idea. The novel that has standard language could be used as main object in student’s comprehension in identifying intrinsic, extrinsic and linguistic features of a contemporary novel.
